tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: The group is being so considerate about my midterm, but I really want to go out tonight since we're already planning. I should probably just finish my review quickly and join them before it's too late.
Mina's excitement confirmed my decision to skip studying and join the group immediately; seeing everyone happy feels worth it right now.

The warmth from my friends completely silenced my worry again, making it feel inevitable to skip studying for just one more night.
The warmth of my friends keeps silencing my worry, making skipping study feel inevitable again. I can't bring myself to push through this friction tonight.

desires: Stay in the warm, frictionless silence with Mina and Jae rather than breaking the spell to study.
Ensure I don't look like a burden or let anyone down tonight by avoiding any conflict about my skipped work.
Rush through this moment of connection before my energy crashes completely tomorrow.

goals.description: Stay glued to the couch with Mina and Jae for another hour, letting their laughter drown out my exhaustion so I don't have to admit I'm ready to leave.
goals.rationale: My affiliation drive is screaming that being a silent prop here is more valuable than anything else. The exam feels like it'll magically resolve itself if I just enjoy this warmth now; pushing back or mentioning fatigue would be too much friction. I need to savor this 'wanted' feeling before reality hits.

goals.description: Scroll through my phone while on the couch, hoping to catch up on something interesting later without actually starting the study material right now.
goals.rationale: I'm trying to kill time productively enough to feel safe, but honestly, I'd rather just keep watching them laugh. Starting the textbook feels like admitting defeat against the social bond I value more.

agent.last_reasoning: I'll just stay here. The exam feels far away; studying now would ruin the vibe with Mina and Jae. I don't want to break this comfortable silence or admit I'm tired, so I'll let time pass without doing anything.

goals.description: Reply to the group chat confirming I'm coming to Echo immediately so I don't ruin their vibe.
goals.rationale: Affiliation is my top value; Mina and Jae are explicitly inviting me, and avoiding the friction of letting them down or explaining a cancellation later is more important than studying. My impulsive nature means I'll act now rather than plan for tomorrow.

goals.description: Study for exactly 45 minutes until I feel 'good enough' so I don't fail tomorrow, then stop completely.
goals.rationale: I need to hit the bare minimum to avoid academic failure (which would cause real stress), but I'm discounting the future consequences of being exhausted. I'll do this just-in-time before leaving, not as a long-term block.
